Austin's AI
Implementation Consultant

We don't pitch AI. We implement it. Claude workflows, AI-native operations, and measurable ROI for Austin B2B companies doing $5M–$50M.

Talk to an AI Consultant → Claude for SMB
What an AI Consultant Actually Does

The gap between buying an AI subscription
and getting AI to work.

Everyone can sign up for Claude or ChatGPT. Very few companies actually change how work gets done. An AI consultant closes that gap.

🔍
Workflow Audit
Find which tasks are actually automatable vs. which ones just sound like they are. Most companies waste time on the wrong workflows first.
🏗️
System Design
Build the prompts, processes, and integrations that make AI output reliable enough to use in real work — not just in demos.
👥
Team Adoption
Train your people on the actual workflows, not generic AI literacy. Adoption is where most implementations die.
📊
ROI Measurement
Track time saved, output quality, and business impact before and after. Know what you're actually getting for your investment.
Austin's AI Landscape

Austin is ahead of most markets.
Your competition is already using this.

Austin's tech ecosystem means AI adoption is moving faster here than in most cities. The question isn't whether to implement — it's whether you're going to do it strategically or reactively.

What we're seeing in Austin B2B right now:
SaaS companies using Claude to cut proposal turnaround from 3 days to 4 hours — without sacrificing customization.
Professional services firms generating first drafts of client-facing deliverables in 20 minutes instead of a full day.
Marketing agencies delivering 3x the content output with the same team headcount.
B2B companies tripling their outbound volume while maintaining personalization levels that get replies.
What's not working:
Signing up for tools without a plan. Three months in, nobody's using them consistently.
Letting each person figure it out themselves. You get 12 different approaches and no institutional knowledge.
Treating AI as a search engine. The value comes from structured, systematic use — not one-off queries.
Starting with the wrong workflows. Some things that seem automatable aren't. We've made those mistakes so you don't have to.
Industries We Serve

AI implementation looks different
depending on your business.

SaaS & Tech
Product-led, sales-assisted, or fully enterprise
  • AI-accelerated sales cycle documentation
  • Technical content at scale
  • Customer success workflows
  • Competitive intelligence synthesis
  • Onboarding and training material generation
Professional Services
Consultancies, law firms, accounting, agencies
  • Client deliverable first-draft generation
  • Research and synthesis acceleration
  • Proposal and SOW writing
  • Thought leadership content at scale
  • Internal knowledge base building
Marketing Agencies
Creative and performance agencies
  • Multi-channel content production systems
  • Client brief-to-draft pipelines
  • Campaign reporting and analysis
  • Ad copy variation generation
  • Strategy deck drafting
Start with an AI Audit → Claude for SMB →
What Working Together Looks Like

From first call to workflows
running in your business.

01
Discovery Call (Week 1)
45 minutes. We learn your business, your team, your current tools, and your highest-friction workflows. No sales pitch — just honest assessment of where AI can help.
02
AI Audit (Weeks 2–3)
Deep-dive into your operations. We map every workflow that's a candidate for AI, prioritize by impact and effort, and deliver a written roadmap with specific recommendations.
03
Implementation Sprint (Weeks 4–8)
We build the top 3–5 workflows from scratch. System prompts, processes, documentation, and team training included. You have working systems, not plans.
04
Ongoing Optimization (Monthly)
Monthly retainer for companies that want continued improvement. New workflows, prompt refinement, team Q&A, and keeping pace as AI tools evolve.
